accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Open the Plug-in Manager in Maya, scroll down and find the RenderMan for Maya plug-in.  If you can't find RenderMan for Maya listed,
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 在 Maya 中打开 Plug-in Manager，向下滚动并找到 RenderMan for Maya plug-in。如果你找不到列出的 RenderMan for Maya，

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: head for the browse button.  See
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 去点 browse button。请参阅

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: troubleshooting
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: troubleshooting（故障排查）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Windows > Settings/Preferences > Plug-In Manager
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Windows > Settings/Preferences > Plug-In Manager

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: After the RenderMan for Maya plug-in has been successfully loaded, the first thing you should notice is the
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya plug-in 成功 loaded 后，你首先应该注意到的是

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Shelf
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Shelf

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The shelf includes a button that loads the plug-in.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: shelf 包含一个用于加载 plug-in 的 button。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Preferred Renderer
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Preferred Renderer（首选渲染器）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The first time RenderMan for Maya is loaded, a dialog will ask if you would like RenderMan to be your preferred renderer.  This simply sets the Maya preference for the preferred renderer.  Each time a new scene is created in Maya, the preferred renderer becomes active.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 第一次加载 RenderMan for Maya 时，会出现一个 dialog，询问你是否希望 RenderMan 成为 preferred renderer。这只是设置 Maya 的 preferred renderer preference。每次在 Maya 中创建 new scene 时，preferred renderer 都会变为 active。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: If RenderMan is not set as your preferred renderer, any of the RenderMan shelf buttons will switch back to RenderMan before performing their action, or you can switch in the Render Settings.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 如果 RenderMan 未设为你的 preferred renderer，任何 RenderMan shelf buttons 都会在执行其 action 前切回 RenderMan；你也可以在 Render Settings 中切换。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Let's Render Something!
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Let's Render Something!（来渲染点东西！）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan for Maya requires RenderMan lights and materials.  Most of Maya's texture nodes are
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan for Maya 需要 RenderMan lights 和 materials。Maya 的大多数 texture nodes 都

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: supported
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: supported（受支持）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: , but Maya lights and materials are ignored.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: ，但 Maya lights 和 materials 会被忽略。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Set Up Lights
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Set Up Lights（设置灯光）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan lights
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan lights

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Shelf
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Shelf

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: , Hypershade, or the
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 、Hypershade 或

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Menu
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Menu

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: PxrEnvDayLight
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: PxrEnvDayLight

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: using the shelf button's popup menu.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: ，使用 shelf button 的 popup menu。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: You'll see a new light manipulator in the scene:
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 你会在 scene 中看到一个新的 light manipulator：

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Hitting the 't' key while the manipulator is selected allows you to interactively position the sun.  Other RenderMan lights show a center of interest manipulator when you hit 't'.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 选中 manipulator 时按下 't' key，可 interactively position the sun。其他 RenderMan lights 在你按下 't' 时会显示 center of interest manipulator。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: A couple of commonly adjusted controls on RenderMan lights are exposure and visibility.  Lights have a physical falloff.  If a light seems dark in a scene, you may want to turn up the exposure from 0.  Increasing by 1 doubles the energy emitted by the light source.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan lights 上几个常调 controls 是 exposure 和 visibility。Lights 具有 physical falloff。如果 scene 中的 light 看起来较暗，可以把 exposure 从 0 调高。每增加 1，light source 发出的 energy 就会翻倍。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: By default, lights are not visible to the camera, so if you want to see the color of the daylight in the background, it needs to be made visible to the camera.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 默认情况下，lights 对 camera 不可见，因此如果想在 background 中看到 daylight 的 color，需要让它对 camera 可见。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Even if you do not create any RenderMan lights or materials in your scene, the render will not be black, as long as Maya's default light setting is enabled in the Render Settings.  Any Maya materials will render with the default RenderMan PxrDiffuse shader, which looks a lot like Maya's default lambert.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 即使你没有在 scene 中创建任何 RenderMan lights 或 materials，只要 Render Settings 中启用了 Maya 的 default light setting，render 也不会是黑的。任何 Maya materials 都会使用 default RenderMan PxrDiffuse shader 渲染，它看起来很像 Maya 的 default lambert。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Create Geometry
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Create Geometry（创建几何体）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Let's create a polygon sphere, from Maya's Polygons shelf.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 从 Maya 的 Polygons shelf 创建一个 polygon sphere。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Set Up Materials
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Set Up Materials（设置材质）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The RenderMan shelf has a button which creates a
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan shelf 有一个 button，可创建

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: PxrLayerSurface
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: PxrLayerSurface

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: and attaches to the current selection.  Legacy materials, like PxrDisney are available through the RenderMan section in the Hypershade window.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 并将其附加到当前 selection。Legacy materials（例如 PxrDisney）可通过 Hypershade window 中的 RenderMan section 获取。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Select the sphere in your scene and click the PxrSurface button.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 在 scene 中选择 sphere，然后点击 PxrSurface button。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Attributes of PxrSurface can be connected to most
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: PxrSurface 的 attributes 可以连接到大多数

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Maya texture nodes
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Maya texture nodes

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: or any of RenderMan's extensive set of
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 或 RenderMan 丰富的

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Preset Browser
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Preset Browser

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: PxrSurface is the single material that you can go to for nearly all your shading needs.  But that one we just created actually looks pretty dull. And the list of attributes looks a bit daunting.  Where to start?  RenderMan includes a library of preset material networks based on PxrSurface.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: PxrSurface 是可以满足几乎所有 shading needs 的单一 material。不过我们刚创建的那个看起来其实相当 dull，而且 attributes 列表看起来有点 intimidating。该从哪里开始？RenderMan 包含一个基于 PxrSurface 的 preset material networks library。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Let's check it out!  Click this button in the RenderMan shelf to open the
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 来看一下！点击 RenderMan shelf 中的这个 button 来打开

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Preset Browser
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Preset Browser

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The first time you open the Preset Browser, a file dialog will open asking you to navigate to the location of a preset library.  The one that ships with RenderMan is under the install.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 第一次打开 Preset Browser 时，会出现一个 file dialog，要求你 navigate 到 preset library 的 location。RenderMan 随附的 library 位于 install 下。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: C:/Program Files/Pixar/RenderManProServer-24.0/lib/RenderManAssetLibrary
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: C:/Program Files/Pixar/RenderManProServer-24.0/lib/RenderManAssetLibrary

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Either copy that directory to your own work area and point there, or go ahead and point the preset browser at the one in the install.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 可以将该 directory 复制到自己的 work area 并指向那里，也可以直接让 preset browser 指向 install 中的那个 directory。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: If you ever need to change this location, visit the Preset Browser section of the
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 如果以后需要更改此 location，请访问 Preset Browser section，位置在

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Preferences
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Preferences
中的 Preset Browser section。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Here's how the Preset Browser will look once it finds the presets, and you click on one of the categories.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Preset Browser 找到 presets 后，并且你点击其中一个 categories 时，它会像这样显示。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Right-click on a material to import and attach it to selected geometry.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Right-click 一个 material，可将其 import 并 attach 到 selected geometry。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The RenderMan shelf includes buttons for preview rendering and
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan shelf 包含用于 preview rendering 和

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: interactive preview rendering
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: interactive preview rendering

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: (IPR).  Maya's buttons for these actions work as well.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: (IPR) 的 buttons。Maya 中用于这些 actions 的 buttons 也同样可用。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: IPR continues rendering until stopped, while changes to materials or lights appear in the render.  Preview rendering continues until the image converges or is cancelled.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: IPR 会持续 render，直到被停止；对 materials 或 lights 的更改会显示在 render 中。Preview rendering 会持续到 image converges 或被取消。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The Image Tool has a button that will cancel either preview or IPR renders.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Image Tool 有一个 button，可取消 preview 或 IPR renders。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: You can also use the "escape" hot-key to easily cancel renders from the Image Tool window.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 你也可以使用 "escape" hot-key，从 Image Tool window 轻松取消 renders。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan Preferences
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan Preferences

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Render Settings
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Render Settings

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Render Settings
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Render Settings

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The Path Tracer is the default integrator, but you can try out others, even while IPR is running.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: Path Tracer 是 default integrator，但即使 IPR 正在运行，你也可以试用其他 integrators。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: motion blur
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: motion blur

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: and denoise.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 和 denoise 等 features。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: to the render.  These get written out at the same time as the main render and can be viewed in the Image Tool
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 到 render。这些 outputs 会与 main render 同时写出，并可在 Image Tool 中查看
